title: glaucium squamigerum
intro: Glaucium squamigerum, also known as Scorpion's Tail or Poppy Glaucium, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant contains alkaloids with medicinal properties, particularly glaucine, which has been used to treat respiratory issues and as a bronchodilator. Glaucium squamigerum has been traditionally used to relieve coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Glaucium squamigerum can be found in various forms, including tinctures, infusions, and capsules, and are often used to promote respiratory health and relieve symptoms associated with colds and flu.
